text_block_list.text:
Special Week injures herself during training, so I
rush her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sorry, Trainer... It looks like I messed up...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I guess I was so desperate to get stronger that I
lost sight of what was around me.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry for being so careless...
choice_data_list:
You should stay in bed today. We can get back
to training later!

You should stay in bed today. We can get back
to training later!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry for being so careless...
choice_data_list:
You should stay in bed today. We can get back
to training later!

You should stay in bed today. We can get back
to training later!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You're right. Even my mom would say that it's
better not to rush at a time like this.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'll make sure I get better... so I can return to
training in tip-top shape.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Heh... I've got so much work to do, and yet...

I make sure Special Week gets some proper rest
today so that she can resume her training.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're right! If I get better quickly, then it
won't be so hard to make up for the lost time!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll focus on my recovery today! See you
tomorrow, Trainer!

I notice that Special Week is still limping the next
day and order her to rest another day.

Perhaps my attempt to cheer her up caused her to
rush her recovery when her body wasn't ready for
it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
This is just a tiny obstacle that stands in the way
of me becoming the top Umamusume in all of
Japan! I'll break right through it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Rahhh! Hurry up and get better! I know you can
do it, body!

Her self-motivation seems to work, as she's fully
recovered and ready to train the very next day.
